properties.opis_srb: Puna Kašika 88 je lokalni ugostiteljski objekat smešten u Brzeću, poznat po prijatnom planinskom ambijentu i tradicionalnom gostoprimstvu. Gostima nudi autentične domaće specijalitete i kuvana jela koja su idealna za osveženje nakon dana provedenog na padinama Kopaonika. Zbog svog opuštenog okruženja, predstavlja popularno mesto za predah i porodični ručak.
properties.opis_eng: Puna Kašika 88 is a local dining establishment located in Brzeće, known for its cozy mountain ambiance and traditional hospitality. It offers guests authentic homemade specialties and cooked dishes that are perfect for refueling after a day spent on the slopes of Kopaonik. Thanks to its relaxed atmosphere, it stands as a popular spot for a quick break or a family lunch.

properties.opis_srb: Moderan Apart hotel u Brzeću, na korak od gondole Bela reka koja vas vodi direktno na vrh Kopaonika. Uživajte u komfornim apartmanima, besplatnom internetu i mirnom planinskom ambijentu savršenom za aktivan odmor i opuštanje tokom cele godine.
properties.opis_eng: Modern Apart hotel in Brzeće, steps away from the Gondola linking you to the heart of Kopaonik. We offer comfy apartments, free Wi-Fi, and a peaceful mountain setting perfect for ski lovers and summer hikers. Your ultimate mountain escape starts here!

properties.opis_srb: Hotel Junior nalazi se u turističkom centru Brzeće na Kopaoniku, na idealnoj nadmorskoj visini od 1100 metara. Tradicionalno gostoprimstvo, okruženje i usluge čine naš hotel centralnim objektom turističke ponude Brzeće. Naš hotel je idealno mesto za organizaciju poslovnih, sportskih, rekreativnih aktivnosti, kao i za opuštanje i uživanje u miru i autentičnoj prirodi.
properties.opis_eng: Junior Hotel is located in the tourist center of Brzeće in Kopaonik, on the ideal altitude of 1100 meters. Traditional hospitality, environment and services make our hotel a central facility of Brzeće tourist offer. Our hotel is an ideal place for organization of business, sport, recreational activities and also for relaxing and enjoying in the peace and authenticity of nature.

properties.opis_srb: Foka Spa je moderan apartmanski kompleks smešten u Brzeću, na padinama Kopaonika. Poznat je po bogatom spa i velnes centru koji gostima pruža opuštanje u bazenu, sauni i đakuziju nakon aktivnog dana na snegu. Objekat spaja planinski šarm sa savremenim komforom, što ga čini odličnim izborom za zimski i letnji odmor.
properties.opis_eng: Foka Spa is a modern apartment complex situated in Brzeće, on the slopes of Mount Kopaonik. It is well-known for its rich spa and wellness center, which offers guests relaxation in a pool, sauna, and hot tub after an active day on the snow. The property blends mountain charm with contemporary comfort, making it an excellent choice for both winter and summer vacations.

properties.opis_srb: Sunčani apartmani su ušuškani smeštajni objekat lociran u Brzeću, idealan za miran odmor u podnožju Kopaonika. Gostima nude funkcionalne i tople apartmane koji pružaju sav komfor potreban za boravak tokom skijaške sezone ili letnjih meseci. Zbog blizine gondole i prirode, predstavljaju odličnu bazu za istraživanje planine i opuštanje.
properties.opis_eng: Sunčani apartmani is a cozy accommodation property located in Brzeće, ideal for a peaceful holiday at the foot of Mount Kopaonik. It offers guests functional and warm apartments providing all the comfort needed for a stay during the ski season or summer months. Thanks to its proximity to both the gondola lift and nature, it serves as an excellent base for exploring the mountain and relaxing.

properties.opis_srb: Vila Mramor je šarmantan planinski objekat smešten u Brzeću, koji gostima pruža topao i domaći ambijent na padinama Kopaonika. Nudi komforne smeštajne jedinice idealne za porodice i ljubitelje prirode koji traže miran kutak za odmor. Zahvaljujući dobroj lokaciji, omogućava lak pristup gondoli i svim zimskim i letnjim sadržajima koje planina nudi.
properties.opis_eng: Vila Mramor is a charming mountain property located in Brzeće, providing guests with a warm and homey ambiance on the slopes of Mount Kopaonik. It offers comfortable accommodation units ideal for families and nature lovers looking for a peaceful holiday retreat. Thanks to its good location, it allows easy access to the gondola lift and all the winter and summer activities the mountain has to offer.

properties.opis_srb: Restoran Koliba je tradicionalni ugostiteljski objekat u Brzeću, prepoznatljiv po svom autentičnom etno ambijentu u drvetu i kamenu. Gostima nudi bogat meni sa akcentom na domaće specijalitete, jela sa roštilja i tradicionalnu srpsku kuhinju kopaoničkog kraja. Izuzetna atmosfera i gostoprimstvo čine ga savršenim mestom za opuštanje i uživanje u hrani nakon dana provedenog na planinskom vazduhu.
properties.opis_eng: Restaurant Koliba is a traditional dining establishment in Brzeće, recognizable by its authentic ethno-style ambiance crafted from wood and stone. It offers guests a rich menu with an emphasis on homemade specialties, grilled dishes, and traditional Serbian cuisine from the Kopaonik region. The exceptional atmosphere and warm hospitality make it a perfect spot to relax and enjoy a meal after a day out in the fresh mountain air.

properties.opis_srb:
Apartmani Bela Reka nalaze se u Brzeću, na polaznoj stanici gondole Brzeće–Mali Karaman.
Za skijaše to znači brži izlazak na staze, bez gužve u centru i bez stresa oko parkinga.
properties.opis_eng: Bela Reka Apartments are located in Brzeće, at the departure station of the Brzeće–Mali Karaman gondola. For skiers, this means a faster route to the slopes, with no crowds in the center and no parking stress.

properties.opis_srb: Vila Košuta je prijatan smeštajni objekat smešten u mirnom okruženju Brzeća, u podnožju Kopaonika. Nudi komforne apartmane idealne za porodice i sve koji žele opušten odmor u prirodnom i autentičnom planinskom ambijentu. Zahvaljujući povoljnoj lokaciji, gostima pruža lak pristup gondoli i svim zimskim i letnjim sadržajima na planini.
properties.opis_eng: Vila Košuta is a pleasant accommodation property situated in the peaceful surroundings of Brzeće, at the foot of Mount Kopaonik. It offers comfortable apartments ideal for families and anyone seeking a relaxed holiday in an authentic, natural mountain setting. Thanks to its convenient location, it provides guests with easy access to the gondola lift and all the winter and summer activities on the mountain.

properties.opis_srb: Vila Ivanović je planinski objekat smešten u mirnom okruženju Brzeća, u podnožju Kopaonika. Nudi autentičan i komforan smeštaj, idealan za ljubitelje prirode, skijanja i planinskog turizma tokom cele godine. Nalazi se u blizini gondole koja direktno povezuje Brzeće sa ski centrom Kopaonik.
properties.opis_eng: Vila Ivanović is a mountain property situated in the peaceful surroundings of Brzeće, at the foot of Mount Kopaonik. It offers authentic and comfortable accommodation, ideal for nature lovers, skiing enthusiasts, and mountain tourism throughout the year. It is located close to the gondola lift that directly connects Brzeće with the Kopaonik ski center.

properties.opis_srb: VIK apartman je moderno opremljen smeštaj lociran u mirnom delu Brzeća, na padinama Kopaonika. Gostima pruža ugodan boravak uz prelep pogled na planinske predele, kompletno opremljenu kuhinju i terasu za opuštanje. Zbog blizine gondole i pratećih sportskih sadržaja, predstavlja odličan izbor za aktivan zimski ili letnji odmor.
properties.opis_eng: VIK apartman is a modernly equipped accommodation located in a peaceful area of Brzeće, on the slopes of Mount Kopaonik. It provides guests with a comfortable stay featuring beautiful mountain views, a fully equipped kitchen, and a terrace for relaxation. Due to its proximity to the gondola lift and various sports activities, it serves as an excellent choice for an active winter or summer holiday.

properties.opis_srb: 4 vodenice (Četiri vodenice) je jedinstven kompleks u Brzeću koji spaja etno tradiciju i prelepo prirodno okruženje pored planinske reke. Objekat je prepoznatljiv po autentičnom ambijentu, stazama za šetnju i bogatoj gastronomskoj ponudi domaće kuhinje kopaoničkog kraja. Predstavlja savršeno mesto za odmor, porodični ručak i uživanje u miru i svežem planinskom vazduhu.
properties.opis_eng: 4 vodenice (Four Watermills) is a unique complex in Brzeće that blends ethno tradition with a beautiful natural setting right next to a mountain river. The property is well-known for its authentic ambiance, walking paths, and a rich gastronomic selection of homemade dishes from the Kopaonik region. It stands as a perfect spot for relaxation, a family lunch, and enjoying the peace and fresh mountain air.

properties.opis_srb: Apartman Tatić je moderno opremljen i komforan smeštajni objekat smešten u mirnom ambijentu Brzeća. Gostima nudi prijatan planinski ambijent i sve neophodne sadržaje za udoban boravak kako tokom skijaške sezone, tako i tokom letnjih meseci. Nalazi se na lokaciji koja omogućava brz i lak pristup gondoli i prirodnim lepotama Kopaonika.
properties.opis_eng: Apartman Tatić is a modernly equipped and comfortable accommodation property situated in the peaceful setting of Brzeće. It offers guests a pleasant mountain ambiance along with all the necessary amenities for a cozy stay during both the ski season and summer months. It is located in an area that allows quick and easy access to the gondola lift and the natural beauty of Mount Kopaonik.

properties.opis_srb: Apartmani Vicko su moderno uređen i funkcionalan smeštajni objekat smešten u mirnom okruženju Brzeća. Gostima nude tople i kompletno opremljene apartmane koji pružaju potpuni komfor i prijatan planinski ambijent tokom cele godine. Lokacija je idealna za sve koji traže odmor u prirodi uz lak i brz pristup gondoli Brzeće–Mali Karaman.
properties.opis_eng: Apartmani Vicko is a modernly decorated and functional accommodation property situated in the peaceful surroundings of Brzeće. It offers guests warm and fully equipped apartments that provide complete comfort and a cozy mountain ambiance throughout the year. The location is ideal for anyone seeking a holiday in nature with quick and easy access to the Brzeće–Mali Karaman gondola lift.

properties.opis_srb: Apartmani Brzeće centar smešteni su na atraktivnoj lokaciji u samom srcu Brzeća, u neposrednoj blizini gondole Brzeće–Mali Karaman. Objekat nudi moderno opremljene, funkcionalne i tople smeštajne jedinice idealne za skijaše i ljubitelje planinske prirode. Gostima je obezbeđen lak pristup lokalnim prodavnicama, restoranima i svim ključnim sadržajima u naselju.
properties.opis_eng: Apartmani Brzeće centar are situated in an attractive location in the very heart of Brzeće, in the immediate vicinity of the Brzeće–Mali Karaman gondola lift. The property offers modernly equipped, functional, and warm accommodation units ideal for skiers and mountain nature lovers. Guests enjoy easy access to local shops, restaurants, and all key amenities in the settlement.

properties.opis_srb: Vila Đurđa je šarmantan planinski objekat smešten u mirnom okruženju Brzeća, na padinama Kopaonika. Nudi komforan i toplo uređen smeštaj koji gostima pruža pravi domaći ambijent i opuštajuću atmosferu tokom cele godine. Zbog svoje dobre lokacije, omogućava brz i lak pristup gondoli i svim prirodnim lepotama ove planine.
properties.opis_eng: Vila Đurđa is a charming mountain property situated in the peaceful surroundings of Brzeće, on the slopes of Mount Kopaonik. It offers comfortable and warmly decorated accommodation that provides guests with a true homey feel and a relaxing atmosphere throughout the year. Thanks to its good location, it allows quick and easy access to the gondola lift and all the natural beauties of the mountain.

properties.opis_srb: Hotel Ozon je moderan i prepoznatljiv hotel smešten u samom srcu Brzeća, u podnožju Kopaonika. Poznat je po izuzetnim sportskim sadržajima, uključujući veliku sportsku dvoranu, kao i prijatnom velnes centru za opuštanje nakon aktivnosti na planini. Gostima nudi komforan smeštaj i odličnu domaću kuhinju, što ga čini idealnim izborom za sportske pripreme, tim-bildinge i porodični odmor.
properties.opis_eng: Hotel Ozon is a modern and well-known hotel situated in the very heart of Brzeće, at the foot of Mount Kopaonik. It is highly regarded for its exceptional sports facilities, including a large indoor sports hall, as well as a cozy wellness center for relaxing after mountain activities. It offers guests comfortable accommodation and excellent local cuisine, making it an ideal choice for athletic training camps, team-building events, and family holidays.

properties.opis_srb: Vila Ranković je prijatan planinski objekat smešten u mirnom i zelenom okruženju Brzeća, na padinama Kopaonika. Gostima nudi udobne smeštajne jedinice sa autentičnim porodičnim gostoprimstvom i toplom atmosferom. Zbog svoje dobre lokacije, predstavlja odličnu bazu za skijaše i ljubitelje prirode koji žele brz pristup gondoli i planinskim stazama.
properties.opis_eng: Vila Ranković is a pleasant mountain property situated in the peaceful and green surroundings of Brzeće, on the slopes of Mount Kopaonik. It offers guests comfortable accommodation units paired with authentic family hospitality and a warm atmosphere. Thanks to its good location, it serves as an excellent base for skiers and nature lovers who want quick access to the gondola lift and mountain trails.

properties.opis_srb: Vila Bela Reka je tradicionalni planinski objekat smešten u Brzeću, u neposrednoj blizini polazne stanice gondole Brzeće–Mali Karaman. Gostima nudi autentičan, topao ambijent i komforne smeštajne jedinice idealne za skijaše i ljubitelje zimske idile. Zbog svoje savršene lokacije, omogućava direktan izlazak na staze Kopaonika bez gužve i stresa oko parkinga.
properties.opis_eng: Vila Bela Reka is a traditional mountain property located in Brzeće, in the immediate vicinity of the departure station of the Brzeće–Mali Karaman gondola lift. It offers guests an authentic, warm ambiance and comfortable accommodation units ideal for skiers and winter enthusiasts. Thanks to its perfect location, it provides direct access to the slopes of Mount Kopaonik without the crowds or parking stress.
